name: Harvest
description: Manage Harvest (time tracking, projects, clients, invoices, expenses) from any AI agent. 10 tools, Bearer auth with account-ID header.
instructions:
This connector wraps the Harvest API v2 (api.harvestapp.com/v2).

**Setup**:
1. Log into https://id.getharvest.com → bottom-left avatar → **Developers → Create new personal access token**.
2. Copy the **token** and the **Account ID** shown on the same page (a 7-digit number like `1234567`).
3. Set both: `HARVEST_ACCESS_TOKEN` and `HARVEST_ACCOUNT_ID`.

**Authentication**: every request requires BOTH:
- `Authorization: Bearer ${HARVEST_ACCESS_TOKEN}`
- `Harvest-Account-Id: ${HARVEST_ACCOUNT_ID}`
- A `User-Agent` header (Harvest API requires it — the adapter sets `AnythingMCP (support@anythingmcp.com)`).

Missing the account header returns `401 Unauthorized` even with a valid token — confusing but documented.

**Hierarchy**: `Client → Project → Task assignment → Time entry`. To log time, you need the project ID + task ID. List projects to find IDs.

**Dates** are ISO 8601 (`2026-05-20`). `spent_date` on a time entry is required.

**Pagination**: `page` (1-based) + `per_page` (max 100). Total in `total_pages`.

**Rate limits**: 100 req / 15s per account; 1k req / 15s globally per token. 429 returns no Retry-After — back off 15s.

**Out of scope here**: invoice line CRUD beyond list/get, estimates, contacts, expenses categories management, recurring schedules.

tools.name: harvest_who_am_i
tools.description: Return the currently authenticated user: id, first_name, last_name, email, is_admin, default_hourly_rate, weekly_capacity.

tools.name: harvest_list_clients
tools.description: List clients. Each has id, name, is_active, address, currency.

updated_since.description: ISO 8601 datetime — only clients updated after this.

tools.name: harvest_list_projects
tools.description: List projects. Most useful filter: `client_id` to drill into one client's projects. Returns id, name, code, is_active, is_billable, budget, hourly_rate, client info.

tools.name: harvest_list_tasks
tools.description: List task templates (the canonical Harvest 'task' types: 'Programming', 'Design', etc.) that can be assigned to projects.

tools.name: harvest_list_time_entries
tools.description: List time entries. Most useful filters: `from`/`to` for date range, `user_id` for one user, `project_id` for one project. Returns each entry with hours, notes, billable status, dates, project, task.

tools.name: harvest_create_time_entry
tools.description: Log time on a project + task. EITHER supply `hours` for a manual entry OR omit hours to start a running timer (you'll need to stop it later with harvest_stop_timer).

task_id.description: Task ID assigned to this project.

hours.description: Hours worked. Omit to start a running timer.

user_id.description: Defaults to current user; admins can log for others.

external_reference.description: External system reference {id, group_id, account_id, permalink, service, service_icon_url}.

tools.name: harvest_update_time_entry
tools.description: Update fields on an existing time entry (notes, hours, project, task).

tools.name: harvest_stop_timer
tools.description: Stop a currently-running time entry timer.

tools.name: harvest_list_invoices
tools.description: List invoices. Filter by client_id, state ('draft', 'open', 'paid', 'closed'), date range. Returns each invoice's number, amount, due_date, paid_date, currency, line items count.

tools.name: harvest_list_expenses
tools.description: List expenses. Filter by client, project, user, date range. Returns each expense's amount, units, billable status, receipt URL.
